subject: Quick note on Cocokind checkout
body:
Hi,

I was looking at Cocokind and noticed Cocokind proof issue zebra 2026-04-09.

That likely matters because Cocokind proof why amber 2026-04-09.

I spend a lot of time finding small checkout blockers like this on Shopify stores.

If useful, I can send the first fix I'd test.

Ross

subject: Quick Shopifixer note for Backlog Manual Proof 1775690467594
body:
Hi,

I took a quick look at Backlog Manual Proof 1775690467594 and my best guess is that Manual intake proof issue..

That is usually a small fix, but it can quietly suppress otherwise qualified purchase intent.

If useful, here is the fix page I would use as the starting point: https://app.abando.ai/fix?store=backlog-manual-1775690467594.example.

I help Shopify stores tighten issues like that without turning it into a big rebuild.

Ross

why_it_matters: Late reassurance adds hesitation at the last conversion step.

observed_issue: Mobile PDP pushes sizing trust below the first scroll.
why_it_matters: When confidence cues land late, purchase intent leaks before add-to-cart.

observed_issue: Mobile PDP makes sizing and returns hard to trust before the first add-to-cart.
why_it_matters: If trust drops on mobile PDP, paid traffic leaks before checkout even starts.

observed_issue: Mobile PDP hides delivery confidence until too late in the buying flow.
why_it_matters: Shoppers hesitate before add-to-cart when delivery trust is unclear on small screens.
issue_hypothesis: Mobile PDP hides delivery confidence until too late in the buying flow.
